title: Sodium-Like Translucent GUI
description: Resource pack that makes the interface similar to the Sodium settings panel
body:
# **Sodium-Like Translucent GUI**
Resource pack that makes the interface similar to the Sodium settings panel

**Requires:**
- Install [Translucency Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/translucencyfix) for GUI translucency (can work with 1.20.1+)
# Screenshots:
![Creative inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ee1c94d63d5de77d2d40d7a9781a933b91e1303.png)
![Game menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9abe69ae7fcc1bf3c541a1af88848b656e650cfa.png)
Credits:
- [Dark Transparent GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-transparent-gui) - taken as a basis
